title: yesterday
content:
just noticed this morning that my backyard has a little war of its own too. it was raining pretty hard and very windy yesterday. unfortunately, i wasn't home during the action. so all i have is the post-war casualty. :D

 %(me)the casualty is the roof belongs to next door (or back door?!) neighbor. luckily, nothing is broken on my side.%

!/gallery/misc/hiwind.jpg!


while i'm at it, i've got 2 new coffee cups for myself yesterday. i love coffee cups. ehehehe

!/gallery/misc/coffeecups.jpg!
